q_quant_rationale: The analysis explicitly compares campaign AOV to non-campaign AOV as a baseline, quantifies the deviation as ~23.2% lower, and the direction (lower) matches the data.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports both AOVs (12,616.93 and 9,693.25 JPY) and order counts (1,834 and 484), and provides a verdict that the hypothesis is supported.
